codeReview.summary: All three bugs properly fixed: (1) apply_owner_resolution() now uses owner_id parameter with correct mapping logic, (2) simple_resolve() now correctly keeps ours and skips theirs via proper state machine, (3) parse_conflicts() now accepts optional file_path parameter and uses actual path as key. All 21 conflict tests pass.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The Rust skill was followed correctly. Transcript shows the worker read the skill file, used proper Rust idioms (Option<FilePath> for backward compat, clone pattern), and followed test update procedure. skillFeedback confirms followedProcedure: true.

summary: Feature fix-git-conflict-owner correctly implements all three bug fixes. apply_owner_resolution() now uses owner_id to determine resolution strategy (ours for 'ours'/'current'/'main', theirs for 'theirs'/'incoming'/'branch', config fallback otherwise). simple_resolve() uses a proper state machine to keep ours section and skip theirs. parse_conflicts() accepts optional file_path parameter and uses it as key instead of hardcoded 'unknown'. All 21 conflict-related tests pass, workspace builds successfully, clippy reports no warnings.
